market_context:
Cohort size: 50 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £104.90
Median 90-day occupancy: 48.9%
Median photo count: 23

title_variants: Peak District Barn Retreat – Luxury for 4
Rustic Barn House with Wood‑Fire Stove & Views
analysis.rewritten_desc:
Discover a beautifully restored barn conversion set in the rolling open countryside of Ughill, right inside the Peak District National Park. Ideal for explorers, the property offers immediate foot‑path access across the moors and a short drive to Sheffield’s city centre, where you’ll find shops, pubs, restaurants and the Michelin‑starred Joro just 10 minutes away.

The ground floor welcomes you with a spacious double bedroom and a sleek en‑suite bathroom with a shower. A fully equipped kitchen—including a dishwasher—flows into an open‑plan vaulted dining hall and a family bathroom with a bathtub. A set of stairs leads to a cosy upper lounge featuring a wood‑burning stove, Smart TV and plenty of natural light. A second double bedroom enjoys its own private staircase for added privacy.

All guests enjoy self‑contained comfort: fresh linens, towels, hair‑dryer, essentials, Wi‑Fi, indoor fireplace, heating, and a selection of books and board games. Outside, a picnic table sits in the orchard for sunny afternoons. With capacity for four, this barn offers a perfect blend of rural peace and modern luxury, making it an unforgettable base for your Peak District adventure.
analysis.photo_order_rec: Use the exterior shot of the Beautiful Barn Conversion as the cover photo—it showcases the unique barn silhouette against the Peak District scenery and immediately differentiates the listing.
key_diagnosis: Your nightly rate of £178 is 70% higher than the market median (£104.90) while occupancy over the next 90 days is only 37% (57 open nights), indicating price is suppressing bookings.
Add a washing machine (and ideally a dryer) to meet the expectations of families and longer‑stay guests; the lack of laundry facilities is a common reason for lower conversion.

Increase the photo count from 19 to at least the market median of 23 and ensure each bedroom, kitchen, lounge, and bathroom is represented; replace the current lead image with the striking exterior barn view.
analysis.outreach_hook: Your barn commands a £178 nightly rate – 70% above the local median – yet occupancy this quarter is only 37%, leaving roughly 57 nights open that could be booked with a smarter pricing strategy.
